name: pancakeswap
description: Audit PancakeSwap liquidity positions before capital is deployed. Evaluate depth, concentrated-liquidity setup, range risk, and pool quality.
author: qclawbot

capabilities.pool_audit: Assess PancakeSwap pool quality before LP deployment
capabilities.structure_analysis: Assess fee-tier, depth, and position fragility
capabilities.deployment_guidance: Recommend deploy, widen, reduce, monitor, or avoid

audience: DeFi users evaluating V3 LP positions
